sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46389" key="zwga/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζωγάνης</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n46389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slave-king</tr_> at festival in Babylon, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1222.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Beros.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
